assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 1. Normal transaction scores below anomaly threshold
assertionResults.title: 1. Normal transaction scores below anomaly threshold

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 2. Obvious outlier (10× average) is flagged as anomaly
assertionResults.title: 2. Obvious outlier (10× average) is flagged as anomaly

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 3. Insufficient data (< 7 points) returns safe result with zero confidence
assertionResults.title: 3. Insufficient data (< 7 points) returns safe result with zero confidence

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 4. Score is always bounded between 0 and 1
assertionResults.title: 4. Score is always bounded between 0 and 1

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 5. Severity levels map correctly to score ranges
assertionResults.title: 5. Severity levels map correctly to score ranges

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 6. Confidence scales with dataset size
assertionResults.title: 6. Confidence scales with dataset size

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 7. Outlier score is higher than normal transaction score
assertionResults.title: 7. Outlier score is higher than normal transaction score

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 8. Results are consistent across multiple runs (low variance)
assertionResults.title: 8. Results are consistent across multiple runs (low variance)

assertionResults.fullName: Isolation Forest — core algorithm 9. Performance: 100 trees on 256-point subsample completes within 2 seconds
assertionResults.title: 9. Performance: 100 trees on 256-point subsample completes within 2 seconds
